649→    results = []

655→            status = "OFFLINE"
656→        elif m.current_baud == 0:

659→            status = "ASNOVA_EMPTY"
660→        else:
661→            status = "RUNNING"
662→        results.append({
663→            "id": m.id, "status": status,
664→            "category_id": m.category_id,
665→            "meters": round(m.current_total_meters, 2),
666→            "shift_meters": round(m.shift_meters, 2),
667→            "remaining": round(remaining, 2),
668→            "initial_asnova_length": m.initial_asnova_length,
669→            "meters_at_fill": m.meters_at_fill,
670→            "baud": m.current_baud, "protocol": m.current_protocol,
671→            "connection_source": m.connection_source,
672→            "preferred_source": m.preferred_source,
673→            "last_seen": m.last_seen.isoformat() if m.last_seen else None,
674→            "sys_info": {
675→                "ram": {"free": m.esp_free_ram, "total": m.esp_total_ram},
676→                "rom": {"free": m.esp_free_rom, "total": m.esp_total_rom},
677→                "cpu": m.esp_cpu_freq,
